name: hexa-lsp
description: Wire the hexa-lang LSP server (`hexa lsp`) for `.hexa` files in Claude Code. Minimal scope: only `.hexa` is claimed. LSP config carried in plugin-root `.lsp.json` (the canonical Claude Code LSP filename — dot-prefixed; auto-discovered, no manifest field needed). Requires `hexa` on PATH; if absent, Claude Code surfaces the error in /plugin Errors.
